inputs.prompt:
You are a film director planning a short film. Concept: "Sexy anthropomorphic toxic flora in a pastel mint-green brutalist containment center. Silent story told via excruciatingly slow body language and ASMR tactile close-ups. A delicate Orchid betrays her voluptuous Pitcher Plant girlfriend. Characters include a rigid Anthurium with a glowing spadix and corseted Belladonna berries. Climax: Pitcher Plant, Anthurium, and Belladonna share a languid, symbiotic fluid exchange on a centered mustard yellow velvet couch, while the camera reveals the Orchid clinically vacuum-sealed inside a frosted cryogenic wall-drawer in the background.". Mood: unsettling sensual.
Plan exactly 4 scenes. For each scene, write a vivid image generation prompt (2-3 sentences) describing the visual.
Output ONLY a JSO… <+87 chars>

data.text: a pastel mint-green brutalist containment center, capturing a voluptuous anthropomorphic Pitcher Plant tenderly stroking a
delicate, translucent Orchid. The camera focuses on the ASMR-like tactile textures of slippery, nectar-slicked curves
against fragile petals, radiating an unsettlingly sensual mood as the Orchid's stiff posture hints at silent betrayal.",
"A rigid, anthropomorphic Anthurium with an intensely glowing neon spadix and a dark, alluring Belladonna wearing a
tight corset of toxic black berries emerge from the mint-green concrete shadows. Captured in an excruciatingly slow, macro-
focused shot, their glossy, veined skin drips with viscous toxic sap, setting a tone of creeping, erotic dread.",
"The voluptuous Pitcher Plant reacts to the Orchid's deceit, using thick, wet vines to slowly
and sensually overpower the fragile white flower against a cold mint-green brutalist pillar. The camera emphasizes the glistening friction
between soft, humid plant flesh and rigid concrete, turning the silent struggle into a mesmerizing, sticky tactile display.",
"A languid, symbiotic exchange of glowing, viscous fluids takes place between the Pitcher Plant, Anthurium, and
Belladonna as they sprawl entwined across a mustard yellow velvet couch centered in the room. In the chillingly clinical
background, the camera reveals the delicate Orchid frozen in silent defeat, permanently vacuum-sealed behind the frosted glass of a cryogenic
